anchors.string: "AHCI disk queue detected spurious wakeup, status = 0x%08x\n" @%s:%d
[AHCI][DISK][%08X] %s::%d:Already changed state to new power state, done
[AHCI][DISK][%08X] %s::%d:We've been terminated, ack the PM transition and bail.
[AHCI][BST][%08X] IOAHCIDiskQueueManager::ChangePowerState - Telling driver to reset, fInflightCommands = %d
[AHCI][BST][%08X] IOAHCIDiskQueueManager::ChangePowerState - Telling driver to sleep, fInflightCommands = %d
"AppleAHCIDiskQueueManager::InitializeBatchCounts - invalid batch counts (tier1=0x%x, tier2/3=0x%x, batch qd=0x%x)\n" @%s:%d
[AHCI][BST][%08X] AppleAHCIDiskQueueManager::InitializeBatchCounts - initialized batch counts. Batch QD - %d, Batch total - %d, Tier1 - %d, Throttle - %d
"AHCI: Should not be able to fail to dispatch a NULL request" @%s:%d
[AHCI][BST][%08X] IOAHCIBlockStorageDriver::DetermineDeviceFeatures - Disabling NCQ ... controller does not support it!
[AHCI][BST][%08X] IOAHCIBlockStorageDriver::DetermineDeviceFeatures - Disabling NCQ ... drive does not support it!
[AHCI][BST][%08X] IOAHCIBlockStorageDriver::DetermineDeviceFeatures - Disabling NCQ ... user boot-arg requested it!
[AHCI][BST][%08X] IOAHCIBlockStorageDriver::DetermineDeviceFeatures - NCQ support survived all obstacles ... will be enabled!
[AHCI][BST][%08X] IOAHCIBlockStorageDriver::DetermineDeviceFeatures - Due to controller's restriction we will use queue depth = %d
[AHCI][BST][%08X] IOAHCIBlockStorageDriver::DetermineDeviceFeatures - PHY PM disabled for devices attached to a Port Multiplier
[AHCI][BST][%08X] IOAHCIBlockStorageDriver::DetermineDeviceFeatures - Host PHY PM disabled by AHCI driver
[AHCI][BST][%08X] IOAHCIBlockStorageDriver::DetermineDeviceFeatures - Device PHY PM disabled by AHCI driver
[AHCI][BST][%08X] IOAHCIBlockStorageDriver::DetermineDeviceFeatures - Device is NOT an Apple-shipped SSD
[AHCI][BST][%08X] IOAHCIBlockStorageDriver::DetermineDeviceFeatures - !!!!! WARNING !!!!! - Force Data Set Management is set
[AHCI][DISK][%08X] %s::%d:!!!!! WARNING !!!!! - Force Data Set Management is set
[AHCI][BST][%08X] IOAHCIBlockStorageDriver::EnableDeviceFeatures, no tags available, reusing from failed request
SATA WARNING: Enable Drive PHY PM failed
SATA WARNING: Enable host PHY PM failed
[AHCI][DISK][%08X] %s::%d:SATA WARNING: Set drive APM level failed
[AHCI][BST][%08X]Did not find IODTNVRAM matching service after %llu seconds.
[AHCI][BST][%08X]*IOAHCIBlockStorageDriver::ExecuteRequest - Telling queue manager device recovery in progress
[AHCI][BST][%08X]*IOAHCIBlockStorageDriver::NormalCompletion - Queue blocked, more commands to resend
[AHCI][DISK][%08X] %s::%d:NCQ error state caused by queued command = %d
[AHCI][DISK][%08X] %s::%d:NCQ error state caused by non-queued command
[AHCI][DISK][%08X] %s::%d:Dump of Read Log Extended Page 10h data
[AHCI][DISK][%08X] %s::%d:Read Log Extended did not complete successfully, status = 0x%08x
SATA WARNING: Read Log Extended data is incorrect - bad checksum
[AHCI][BST][%08X] IOAHCIBlockStorageDriver::ResendFromRecoveryQueue - Error recovery list queue was empty. Attempting to unblock queue
[AHCI][BST][%08X] IOAHCIBlockStorageDriver::ResendFromRecoveryQueue - Found tag = %d with no retries available
[AHCI][BST][%08X] IOAHCIBlockStorageDriver::ResendFromRecoveryQueue - Sent one command, arming watchdog and breaking out
[AHCI][DISK][%08X] %s::%d:Failed to issue COM RESET successfully after %d attempts. Failing...
Failed to issue COM RESET successfully after %d attempts. Failing...
Failed to issue COM RESET after %d attempts. Terminating.
[AHCI][DISK][%08X] %s::%d:Attempted to launch recovery thread while already running recovery thread!
"AHCI: More than one SMS request on resend list\n" @%s:%d
"AHCI: Invalid request type = %d in resend queue\n" @%s:%d
"AHCI: Trying to issue read log extended without a recovery queue item\n" @%s:%d
"IOAHCIBlockStorageDriver::CommandTimeout! LBA = 0x%qx, Block Count = 0x%qx, Tag = 0x%X, Operation Type = 0x%X fis[0]=0x%X, fis[1]=0x%X, fis[2]=0x%X, fis[3]=0x%X, fis[4]=0x%X" @%s:%d
[AHCI][DISK][%08X] %s::%d:LBA = 0x%qx, Block Count = 0x%qx, Tag = 0x%X, Operation Type = 0x%X fis[0]=0x%X, fis[1]=0x%X, fis[2]=0x%X, fis[3]=0x%X, fis[4]=0x%X

[AHCI][DISK][%08X] %s::%d:EnableDeviceFeatures failed because of a timeout, device has already been reset
IOAHCIBlockStorageDriver: drive not responding during power transition
Drive not responding during power transition. Terminating.

IOAHCIBlockStorageDriver: could not recover SATA HDD after %d attempts, terminating
Could not recover SATA HDD after %d attempts. Terminating.
SATA WARNING: Identify data is incorrect - bad checksum
SATA WARNING: IDENTIFY DEVICE checksum not implemented
SATA WARNING: completing a zero block transfer
